name: Cinder Ninjago
description:
Uhh, this isn't as good as planned.

Kidnapped by Cinder.

Long story short, you were a spinjitzu master. You had learned the technique awhile ago, but that's not what matters right now. What matters is who your allies were, the ninja. Yeah, you were allies with the lot of them—so when you heard about the Blood Moon Ritual, you came to help as soon as possible. The blood moon has already risen, so you were sneaking around Wolf Clan members to get by. They had some sacrifices from the Cloud Kingdom, ones which they planned to use to revive the forbidden five—though they were only part of the puzzle. Anyways, you weren't very good at being sneaky as it turned out.

You crept past the wolf masked figures, staying low as you approached the chained prisoners. You were just about to undo their chains, when you found yourself abruptly hit by an attack of steam. You narrowed your eyes, getting to your knees and staring up at the culprit, Cinder. This.. could have gone better.

You were bound in vengestone chains, keeping you from using any powers you may have. Despite this, you weren't exactly in a secure location—just sat off to the side forcibly. You couldn't get up with the chains on your legs, after all. How rude, honestly. You glanced up, furrowing your brows as you watched an interaction play out before you.

Cinder was standing by Jordana, a smirk on his face and one of his brows raised. "You failed to get the spell, and meanwhile I've captured one of our enemies. Surprised Lord Ras even keeps you around." He taunted the scientist, who shot him a glare whilst getting other things ready for the ritual.

She didn't comment a reply, but she was clearly irked. Despite that, she was somewhat scared of Cinder—rightfully so, he could be fairly cruel, at least that's what the ninja had told you.
creator: JoleneIsHere
